global_rules: No browser may call partner systems directly; simulators sit behind the same internal adapter boundaries.
Simulator success must never be projected as live external confirmation.
Any dependency blocked on contracting, account creation, SCAL, Sandpit, AOS, or other partner approval stays partial or non-simulatable until that gate is real.

yes.local_stub_strategy: Use synthetic PDS response fixtures and fail-closed enrichment toggles; keep real credentials and legal-basis proof out of this task.

Stale or misconfigured monitored email or professional number
Contact-route repair blocks the expected return channel

no.local_stub_strategy: No truthful simulator. The local system can model watchlist rows, but the authoritative external standards posture still requires human review and current source authority.

Supplier assurance evidence is stale or suspended
Dependency hygiene scan still reports legacy references
